items.name: Gold
items.description: The universal currency.

items.name: Iron Ore
items.description: Raw iron ore, used in smithing.

items.name: Iron Sword
items.description: A sturdy blade forged from iron. Reliable if not remarkable.

items.name: Steel Shield
items.description: A well-crafted shield that can block most attacks.

items.name: Ancient Blade
items.description: A sword of unknown origin, its edge never dulls and it glows faintly in darkness.

items.name: Health Potion
items.description: A red potion that restores health when consumed.

items.name: Antidote
items.description: Cures poison and provides temporary resistance.

items.name: Bread
items.description: A loaf of fresh bread. Restores a small amount of health.

items.name: Ale
items.description: A mug of hearty ale. Warms the spirit.

items.name: Fresh Vegetables
items.description: A bundle of fresh vegetables from the farm.

items.name: Inn Room Key
items.description: A key to a room at Martha's inn.

items.name: Moonflower
items.description: A rare flower that only blooms under moonlight. Used in powerful remedies.

items.name: Thornroot
items.description: A hardy root with medicinal properties. Watch out for the thorns.

items.name: Straw Bundle
items.description: A bundle of dried straw. Useful for various purposes.

items.name: Old Clothes
items.description: Worn but serviceable clothing.

items.name: Stolen Supplies
items.description: Supplies taken by the bandits from merchants and travelers.

items.name: Ancient Map
items.description: A weathered map showing the location of ruins deep in the forest. Strange symbols mark points of interest.

items.name: Sunstone
items.description: An artifact of immense power. It radiates warmth and light, and seems to pulse with an inner energy.

items.name: Wood
items.description: A rough-hewn log. Essential for crafting and building.

items.name: Stone
items.description: A chunk of solid rock. Used in construction and tool-making.

items.name: Plant Fiber
items.description: Tough fibrous strands stripped from bushes. Useful for rope and bindings.

items.name: Flower Petal
items.description: A colorful petal. Ingredient for potions and dyes.

items.name: Mushroom
items.description: A wild mushroom. Edible, but barely.

items.name: Cactus Flesh
items.description: Moist inner flesh of a cactus. Slightly nourishing.

items.name: Bark
items.description: Stripped tree bark. Useful for tanning and kindling.

items.name: Rope
items.description: A sturdy length of rope woven from plant fiber.

items.name: Wooden Planks
items.description: Smooth planks cut from raw wood. A refined building material.

items.name: Iron Ingot
items.description: A bar of smelted iron, ready for smithing.

items.name: Stone Axe
items.description: A crude axe with a stone head lashed to a wooden handle. Gets the job done.

items.name: Stone Pickaxe
items.description: A rough pickaxe fashioned from stone and wood. Chips away at rock slowly but surely.

items.name: Wooden Club
items.description: A heavy stick shaped into a basic weapon. Better than bare fists.

items.name: Torch
items.description: A wooden stick wrapped in bark and fiber. Provides light in dark places.

items.name: Bandage
items.description: A simple dressing made from cloth strips. Stops bleeding and heals minor wounds.

items.name: Herbal Remedy
items.description: A poultice of crushed herbs and roots. Provides steady healing over time.

items.name: Mushroom Stew
items.description: A hearty stew of wild mushrooms. Filling and restorative.

items.name: Iron Axe
items.description: A proper axe with a forged iron head. Fells trees with ease.

items.name: Iron Pickaxe
items.description: A forged iron pickaxe. Breaks stone and ore efficiently.

items.name: Wooden Shield
items.description: A simple shield of bound planks. Offers basic protection.
